color-no-hex.message: Hardcoded hex is banned in .vue styles. Use a --color-* token (§3.G).

selector-disallowed-list.message: Dark mode CSS uses .dark only (Tailwind dark: variant or :where(.dark) &). §3.R

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Legacy --o2-* tokens are banned. Use the modern --color-* token or a Tailwind utility.
